source: # === 隨機事件:靜態訊息 (events.go,過顯示層覆蓋) ===
Disjunction! The fabric of magic has been torn asunder destroying all overland enchantments.
zh: 解咒!魔法的織體被撕裂,摧毀了戰略地圖上所有的結界。

source: Bad Moon! The moon controlling the powers over evil waxes, doubling the power from evil temples.
zh: 凶月!掌管邪惡力量的月亮漸盈,使邪惡神殿產生的魔力加倍。

source: The bad moon has waned.
zh: 凶月已經虧缺。

source: Good Moon! The moon controlling the powers over good waxes, doubling the power of good temples.
zh: 吉月!掌管良善力量的月亮漸盈,使良善神殿產生的魔力加倍。

source: The good moon has waned.
zh: 吉月已經虧缺。

source: The rising triad of red stars come together, doubling all power gained from red nodes and halving all others.
zh: 升起的三顆紅星交會,使紅色節點獲得的魔力加倍,其餘所有節點減半。

source: The conjunction of chaos has ended.
zh: 混沌交會已經結束。

source: The rising triad of green stars come together, doubling all power gained from green nodes and halving all others.
zh: 升起的三顆綠星交會,使綠色節點獲得的魔力加倍,其餘所有節點減半。

source: The conjunction of nature has ended.
zh: 自然交會已經結束。

source: The rising triad of blue stars come together, doubling all power gained from blue nodes and halving all others.
zh: 升起的三顆藍星交會,使藍色節點獲得的魔力加倍,其餘所有節點減半。

source: The conjunction of sorcery has ended.
zh: 祕法交會已經結束。

source: Magic Short! All sources of magical power have been shorted out.
zh: 魔力短路!所有魔力來源都被切斷了。

source: The mana short has ended and magic has returned to normal.
zh: 魔力短路已經結束,魔法恢復正常。

source: # === 隨機事件:動態模板 (TranslateFormat,%v 順序須與原文一致) ===
Depletion! A %v mine within %v has become depleted and can no longer be mined.
zh: 枯竭!%v 礦脈在「%v」境內已經枯竭,無法再開採。

source: Diplomatic Marriage! The neutral %v of %v has offered to join your cause.
zh: 聯姻!中立的%v「%v」提議加入你的陣營。

source: Donation! A wealthy merchant has decided to support your cause with a contribution of %v gold.
zh: 捐獻!一位富商決定捐助 %v 金幣支持你的大業。

source: Earthquake! A violent quake struck %v, killing %v people and %v units, and destroying %v buildings.
zh: 地震!一場劇烈地震襲擊了「%v」,造成 %v 名居民與 %v 個單位喪生,並摧毀 %v 棟建築。

source: The Gift! An ancient God has returned, bearing the relic of %v to aid your cause.
zh: 天賜!一位遠古神祇歸來,帶來「%v」聖物相助你的大業。

source: A meteor has hit %v killing %v townsfolk and %v units, and destroying %v buildings.
zh: 一顆隕石擊中了「%v」,造成 %v 名市民與 %v 個單位喪生,並摧毀 %v 棟建築。

source: New Mine! Surveyors find a %v deposit near the %v of %v.
zh: 新礦脈!勘測員發現一處 %v 礦藏,位於%v「%v」附近。

source: Pirates! Pirates have plundered your gold reserve, looting and stealing %v gold.
zh: 海盜!海盜洗劫了你的金庫,搶走了 %v 金幣。

source: PLAGUE! A virulent plague has broken out in the %v of %v.
zh: 瘟疫!一場致命瘟疫在%v「%v」爆發。

source: The plague in %v has ended.
zh: 「%v」的瘟疫已經結束。

source: Population Boom! A sudden population boom doubles the population growth rate of the %v of %v.
zh: 人口激增!突如其來的人口潮使%v「%v」的人口成長率加倍。

source: The population boom in %v has ended.
zh: 「%v」的人口激增已經結束。

source: Rebellion! The %v of %v has rebelled and become a neutral city.
zh: 叛亂!%v「%v」發動叛亂,淪為中立城市。
